_comment_1: Per-platform Native AOT publish-output file-size baselines for SizeTrackingApp.AOT.
_comment_2: Updated locally for a single platform via `make update-aot-size-baseline`. To refresh all platforms after a CI run, open each matrix leg's 'Check AOT size' step log, copy the size_bytes value from its AOT-SIZE-RESULT block, and update the matching platforms.<rid>.size_bytes entry below.
_comment_3: Bidirectional tolerance: the check fails on growth OR shrinkage beyond max(tolerance_bytes, tolerance_percent% of baseline) so the window can be ratcheted tighter over time.
